description:
Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi. Location: Fustat. Dating: 1130–38 CE, based on Ḥalfon's dates and the fact that Abū l-Barakāt b. Ḥārith was still in Spain as of 1130 CE before migrating to Egypt. The document is the conditions for the engagement of the merchant Barakāt b. Ḥārith ha-Levi with Sitt al-Furs bt. Peraḥya. One of the conditions concerns his taking a second wife, but the right side of the document containing the missing context is unfortunately missing. 

Goitein and Friedman both identify this Abū l-Barakāt b. Ḥārith ha-Levi with the Avraham b. Ḥārith ha-Levi who signed legal documents including T-S 12.706 (PGPID 20065) and T-S 20.5 (PGPID 7499). This seems probable not certain, since as yet we have no documents containing the full name Abū l-Barakāt Avraham b. Ḥārith.
tags: 12th c, Marriage, marital reconciliation, Halfon b. Menashshe
description_he: שטר משפטי בכתב חלפון בן מנשה הלוי, פוסטאט, 1130–1138. תנאי שידוכים לסוחר ברכאת בן חארת הלוי עם סת אל-פורס בת פרחיה. אחד התנאים נוגע לנישואין שניים.
